hooks.command: cd "/Users/chunhuiliu/Moto-Claude Code/content-canvas" && if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then git add -A && files=$(git diff --cached --name-only | head -4 | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/ $//') && git commit -m "auto-save: $files" && git push origin main && echo "[auto-commit] pushed: $files"; fi
